markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, new AI visibility tool, and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline Unblocked:** The 10-article backlog will be published immediately to accelerate progress. Nicky will update statuses in the new Airtable interface today.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** Re-prioritize low-volume "vs." and QM-focused articles to High/Medium. Rationale: They capture high-intent search and train LLMs to cite Cresta's products.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**New Tool Live:** GrowthX's AI visibility tool, CheckThat, is live. Nicky and Annie will receive new invites to review the 225 tracked prompts and ensure they align with Cresta's strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [**Product Walkthrough:** A 30-min product deep-dive with Oren will be rescheduled to update GrowthX's internal knowledge base and inform future content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Prioritization

  - [**Backlog Publishing:** The 10-article backlog will be published immediately to accelerate progress.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Rationale:** No negative SEO impact from batch publishing this volume; the priority is catching up.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**New Airtable Interface:** A new interface simplifies status updates. Nicky confirmed the team will use it to update the backlog today.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Topic Prioritization Review:** Revisit low-priority topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [**"Vs." Articles (e.g., Cresta vs. Competitor):**](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
          - [**Action:** Re-prioritize to High.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Capture high-intent search and train LLMs to cite Cresta's products.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**QM-Focused Keywords (e.g., call center scoring):**](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
          - [**Action:** Re-prioritize to Medium.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Low-volume but problem-solving intent; directly showcases Cresta's automated scoring product.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Unindexed Pages:** A list of older, unindexed pages remains.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Context:** Ada previously resubmitted these, so the current status may be a processing delay.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Action:** Monitor the list to determine if further action is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### CheckThat AI Visibility Tool

  - [**Overview:** GrowthX's new AI visibility tool, CheckThat, is live. It tracks Cresta's presence, sentiment, and share of citations in AI search results.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [**Access & Usage:**](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
      - [Nicky and Annie will receive new invites, as the first batch may have failed.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Action:** Review the 225 tracked prompts (via the shared spreadsheet) to ensure they align with Cresta's strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [**Prompt Library:** Add new prompts from a shared library with historical data for immediate insights.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [**Platform-Specific Data:** View performance by AI platform (e.g., Google's AI Overview).](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Source Analysis:** See top-cited content, grouped by buyer journey stage and persona.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
      - [**Company Context:** Update Cresta's profile with new products/features to enrich the AI's understanding.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Product Walkthrough

  - [**Goal:** Reschedule the canceled 30-min product deep-dive with Oren.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [**Purpose:** Update GrowthX's internal knowledge base to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

### Imagery Feedback

  - [**Action:** Bailey will create a Notion doc with the updated imagery pipeline for Steve's review.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Steve is the primary contact for design feedback, and a previous meeting on this topic may not have occurred.](https://fathom.video/share/PCXa4nt2hcLSXEWX1Fpt8_mUsx_-iUkc?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
